branch.branch_summary: After v9.2.0, select v9.3 as the next bounded frontier: provider preflight execution readiness without live production writes; keep v9.4-v9.6 as roadmap depth for scoped rehearsal, independent validation, and production go/no-go evidence.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v9.2 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Prepare the post-v9.2 frontier: define v9.3 as a controlled provider preflight execution readiness model that remains non-production until explicit go/no-go evidence exists.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Open an implementation task for the current frontier: After v9.2.0, select v9.3 as the next bounded frontier: provider preflight execution readiness without live production writes; keep v9.4-v9.6 as roadmap depth for scoped rehearsal, independent validation, and production go/no-go evidence.
